computeSwapStep and getSqrtPriceTarget with known inputs/outputs. Key properties tested: 1. getSqrtPriceTarget returns correct target based on direction 2. computeSwapStep handles exact input swaps correctly 3. computeSwapStep handles exact output swaps correctly 4. Fee calculations are correct 5. Edge cases: zero amounts, max fees, boundary prices","kind":"dev","methods":{"testFuzz_computeSwapStep_priceDirectionConsistency(uint160,uint160,uint128,uint256,uint24)":{"details":"Uses conservative bounds to avoid overflow in underlying math"},"test_computeSwapStep_exactIn_exhaustInput()":{"details":"When input is exhausted before reaching target"},"test_computeSwapStep_exactIn_reachTarget_zeroForOne()":{"details":"amountRemaining < 0 indicates exact input swap"},"test_computeSwapStep_exactOut_reachTarget()":{"details":"amountRemaining > 0 indicates exact output swap"},"test_computeSwapStep_feeProportionality()":{"details":"Fee + amountIn = totalInput only when we exhaust input (don't reach target)"},"test_computeSwapStep_maxFee()":{"details":"With 100% fee, amountRemainingLessFee = 0, but we only reach target if amountIn to reach target is also 0.      Since prices differ, amountIn > 0, so 0 >= amountIn is false, meaning we exhaust input (which is 0)      and call getNextSqrtPriceFromInput with amountIn=0, returning current price."},"test_computeSwapStep_zeroAmount()":{"details":"amountRemaining = 0 is treated as exact output mode (since 0 >= 0 is true)      When amountRemaining = 0 for exact output, uint256(0) >= amountOut is only true if amountOut = 0"},"test_getSqrtPriceTarget_oneForZero_nextLess()":{"details":"When zeroForOne is false, price increases, so target = min(next, limit)"},"test_getSqrtPriceTarget_zeroForOne_nextGreater()":{"details":"When zeroForOne is true, price decreases, so target = max(next, limit)"},"test_goldenVector_exactIn_oneForZero_cappedAtTarget()":{"details":"Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_exactAmountIn_oneForZero_thatGetsCappedAtPriceTargetIn Scenario: Selling token1 for token0 (oneForZero) with exact input of 1 ether. The swap reaches the price target (101:100 ratio) before exhausting input. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 79228162514264337593543950336 (1:1 price, 2^96) - sqrtPriceTarget: 79623317895830914510639640423 (101:100 price) - liquidity: 2 ether - amountRemaining: -1 ether (exact input) - feePips: 600 (0.06%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - sqrtPriceNext: 79623317895830914510639640423 (reaches target) - amountIn: 9975124224178055 - amountOut: 9925619580021728 - feeAmount: 5988667735148"},"test_goldenVector_exactIn_oneForZero_fullySpent()":{"details":"Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_exactAmountIn_oneForZero_thatIsFullySpentIn Scenario: Selling token1 for token0 (oneForZero) with exact input of 1 ether. The target price is far away (1000:100 = 10x) so input is exhausted before reaching target. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 79228162514264337593543950336 (1:1 price) - sqrtPriceTarget: 250541448375047931186413801569 (1000:100 = 10x price) - liquidity: 2 ether - amountRemaining: -1 ether (exact input) - feePips: 600 (0.06%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - amountIn: 999400000000000000 - amountOut: 666399946655997866 - feeAmount: 600000000000000"},"test_goldenVector_exactOut_cappedAtDesiredAmount()":{"details":"Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_amountOut_isCappedAtTheDesiredAmountOut Scenario: Edge case where computed output would be 2 but requested is 1. Tests proper capping of output amount. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 417332158212080721273783715441582 - sqrtPriceTarget: 1452870262520218020823638996 - liquidity: 159344665391607089467575320103 - amountRemaining: 1 (exact output) - feePips: 1 Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - sqrtPriceNext: 417332158212080721273783715441581 - amountIn: 1 - amountOut: 1 (capped from 2) - feeAmount: 1"},"test_goldenVector_exactOut_oneForZero_cappedAtTarget()":{"details":"Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_exactAmountOut_oneForZero_thatGetsCappedAtPriceTargetIn Scenario: Exact output of 1 ether, but capped at price target. Uses same parameters as exactIn capped test for comparison. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 79228162514264337593543950336 (1:1 price) - sqrtPriceTarget: 79623317895830914510639640423 (101:100 price) - liquidity: 2 ether - amountRemaining: 1 ether (exact output requested) - feePips: 600 (0.06%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - amountIn: 9975124224178055 - amountOut: 9925619580021728 - feeAmount: 5988667735148"},"test_goldenVector_exactOut_oneForZero_fullyReceived()":{"details":"Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_exactAmountOut_oneForZero_thatIsFullyReceivedIn Scenario: Exact output of 1 ether is fully satisfied because target is far away. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 79228162514264337593543950336 (1:1 price) - sqrtPriceTarget: 792281625142643375935439503360 (10000:100 = 100x price) - liquidity: 2 ether - amountRemaining: 1 ether (exact output) - feePips: 600 (0.06%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - amountIn: 2000000000000000000 - amountOut: 1 ether - feeAmount: 1200720432259356"},"test_goldenVector_zeroForOne_lowLiquidity_reachTarget()":{"details":"Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_oneForZero_handlesIntermediateInsufficientLiquidityInExactOutputCase Note: This test uses a zeroForOne direction by having current > target. Uses low liquidity to test edge case handling. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 20282409603651670423947251286016 - sqrtPriceTarget: (sqrtPriceCurrent * 9) / 10 = 18254168643286503381552526157414 - liquidity: 1024 - amountRemaining: 263000 (exact output) - feePips: 3000 (0.3%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - sqrtPriceNext: target price - amountIn: 1 - amountOut: 26214 - feeAmount: 1"}},"title":"SwapMath_V4_Test","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"InvalidTick(int24)":[{"notice":"Thrown when the tick passed to #getSqrtPriceAtTick is not between MIN_TICK and testFuzz_computeSwapStep_priceDirectionC.details: Uses conservative bounds to avoid overflow in underlying math

test_computeSwapStep_exactIn_exhaustInpu.details: When input is exhausted before reaching target

test_computeSwapStep_feeProportionality(.details: Fee + amountIn = totalInput only when we exhaust input (don't reach target)

test_computeSwapStep_maxFee().details: With 100% fee, amountRemainingLessFee = 0, but we only reach target if amountIn to reach target is also 0.      Since prices differ, amountIn > 0, so 0 >= amountIn is false, meaning we exhaust input (which is 0)      and call getNextSqrtPriceFromInput with amountIn=0, returning current price.

test_computeSwapStep_zeroAmount().details: amountRemaining = 0 is treated as exact output mode (since 0 >= 0 is true)      When amountRemaining = 0 for exact output, uint256(0) >= amountOut is only true if amountOut = 0

test_getSqrtPriceTarget_oneForZero_nextL.details: When zeroForOne is false, price increases, so target = min(next, limit)

test_getSqrtPriceTarget_zeroForOne_nextG.details: When zeroForOne is true, price decreases, so target = max(next, limit)

test_goldenVector_exactIn_oneForZero_cap.details: Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_exactAmountIn_oneForZero_thatGetsCappedAtPriceTargetIn Scenario: Selling token1 for token0 (oneForZero) with exact input of 1 ether. The swap reaches the price target (101:100 ratio) before exhausting input. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 79228162514264337593543950336 (1:1 price, 2^96) - sqrtPriceTarget: 79623317895830914510639640423 (101:100 price) - liquidity: 2 ether - amountRemaining: -1 ether (exact input) - feePips: 600 (0.06%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - sqrtPriceNext: 79623317895830914510639640423 (reaches target) - amountIn: 9975124224178055 - amountOut: 9925619580021728 - feeAmount: 5988667735148

test_goldenVector_exactIn_oneForZero_ful.details: Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_exactAmountIn_oneForZero_thatIsFullySpentIn Scenario: Selling token1 for token0 (oneForZero) with exact input of 1 ether. The target price is far away (1000:100 = 10x) so input is exhausted before reaching target. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 79228162514264337593543950336 (1:1 price) - sqrtPriceTarget: 250541448375047931186413801569 (1000:100 = 10x price) - liquidity: 2 ether - amountRemaining: -1 ether (exact input) - feePips: 600 (0.06%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - amountIn: 999400000000000000 - amountOut: 666399946655997866 - feeAmount: 600000000000000

test_goldenVector_exactOut_cappedAtDesir.details: Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_amountOut_isCappedAtTheDesiredAmountOut Scenario: Edge case where computed output would be 2 but requested is 1. Tests proper capping of output amount. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 417332158212080721273783715441582 - sqrtPriceTarget: 1452870262520218020823638996 - liquidity: 159344665391607089467575320103 - amountRemaining: 1 (exact output) - feePips: 1 Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - sqrtPriceNext: 417332158212080721273783715441581 - amountIn: 1 - amountOut: 1 (capped from 2) - feeAmount: 1

test_goldenVector_exactOut_oneForZero_ca.details: Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_exactAmountOut_oneForZero_thatGetsCappedAtPriceTargetIn Scenario: Exact output of 1 ether, but capped at price target. Uses same parameters as exactIn capped test for comparison. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 79228162514264337593543950336 (1:1 price) - sqrtPriceTarget: 79623317895830914510639640423 (101:100 price) - liquidity: 2 ether - amountRemaining: 1 ether (exact output requested) - feePips: 600 (0.06%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - amountIn: 9975124224178055 - amountOut: 9925619580021728 - feeAmount: 5988667735148

test_goldenVector_exactOut_oneForZero_fu.details: Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_exactAmountOut_oneForZero_thatIsFullyReceivedIn Scenario: Exact output of 1 ether is fully satisfied because target is far away. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 79228162514264337593543950336 (1:1 price) - sqrtPriceTarget: 792281625142643375935439503360 (10000:100 = 100x price) - liquidity: 2 ether - amountRemaining: 1 ether (exact output) - feePips: 600 (0.06%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - amountIn: 2000000000000000000 - amountOut: 1 ether - feeAmount: 1200720432259356

test_goldenVector_zeroForOne_lowLiquidit.details: Derived from Uniswap V4 reference: test_computeSwapStep_oneForZero_handlesIntermediateInsufficientLiquidityInExactOutputCase Note: This test uses a zeroForOne direction by having current > target. Uses low liquidity to test edge case handling. Inputs: - sqrtPriceCurrent: 20282409603651670423947251286016 - sqrtPriceTarget: (sqrtPriceCurrent * 9) / 10 = 18254168643286503381552526157414 - liquidity: 1024 - amountRemaining: 263000 (exact output) - feePips: 3000 (0.3%) Expected outputs (from Uniswap V4 tests): - sqrtPriceNext: target price - amountIn: 1 - amountOut: 26214 - feeAmount: 1

testFuzz_computeSwapStep_exactIn_inputCo.notice: Fuzz test: verifies fee + amountIn <= |amountRemaining| for exact input

testFuzz_computeSwapStep_priceDirectionC.notice: Fuzz test: verifies price movement direction matches swap direction

test_computeSwapStep_exactIn_exhaustInpu.notice: Tests computeSwapStep with exact input, not reaching target

test_computeSwapStep_exactIn_oneForZero(.notice: Tests computeSwapStep with exact input, oneForZero direction

test_computeSwapStep_exactIn_reachTarget.notice: Tests computeSwapStep with exact input, reaching target price

test_computeSwapStep_exactOut_cappedByOu.notice: Tests computeSwapStep with exact output, capped by output amount

test_computeSwapStep_exactOut_reachTarge.notice: Tests computeSwapStep with exact output, reaching target

test_computeSwapStep_feeProportionality(.notice: Tests that fee is correctly proportional to input when NOT reaching target

test_computeSwapStep_maxFee().notice: Tests fee calculation with maximum fee (100%)

test_computeSwapStep_noMovement().notice: Tests computeSwapStep when current equals target (no movement)

test_computeSwapStep_zeroAmount().notice: Tests computeSwapStep with zero amount remaining

test_computeSwapStep_zeroFee().notice: Tests fee calculation with zero fee

test_getSqrtPriceTarget_equal().notice: Tests getSqrtPriceTarget when next equals limit

test_getSqrtPriceTarget_oneForZero_limit.notice: Tests getSqrtPriceTarget for zeroForOne = false when limit is less

test_getSqrtPriceTarget_oneForZero_nextL.notice: Tests getSqrtPriceTarget for zeroForOne = false (selling token1)

test_getSqrtPriceTarget_zeroForOne_limit.notice: Tests getSqrtPriceTarget for zeroForOne = true when limit is greater

test_getSqrtPriceTarget_zeroForOne_nextG.notice: Tests getSqrtPriceTarget for zeroForOne = true (selling token0)

test_goldenVector_exactIn_oneForZero_cap.notice: Golden vector test: exactIn oneForZero capped at price target

test_goldenVector_exactIn_oneForZero_ful.notice: Golden vector test: exactIn oneForZero fully spent (exhausts input before target)

test_goldenVector_exactOut_cappedAtDesir.notice: Golden vector test: amountOut capped at desired amount (edge case)

test_goldenVector_exactOut_oneForZero_ca.notice: Golden vector test: exactOut oneForZero capped at target

test_goldenVector_exactOut_oneForZero_fu.notice: Golden vector test: exactOut oneForZero fully received

test_goldenVector_zeroForOne_lowLiquidit.notice: Golden vector test: zeroForOne (selling token0) reaching target price
